properties.name: Levels of Scale
properties.assessment: 5 levels: System → Centers → Modules → Functions → Plugins. Plugin hierarchy adds extensible 5th level.

properties.name: Strong Centres
properties.assessment: 8 core centers + 3 extension centers (EventBus, PluginRegistry, HookSystem). All strongly defined with tests.

properties.name: Boundaries
properties.assessment: PluginBase ABC, HookPoint enum, API route registration — explicit, well-typed boundaries.

properties.name: Alternating Repetition
properties.assessment: Echobeats 4-phase, per-tick plugin dispatch, event emit/subscribe, hook apply chain.

properties.name: Positive Space
properties.assessment: All centers functional. 3 example plugins fill extension space. API has 14 working routes.

properties.name: Good Shape
properties.assessment: Clean module shapes. API Adapter provides well-shaped external interface. Plugin meta describes shape.

properties.name: Local Symmetries
properties.assessment: EventBus on/off, HookSystem add/remove, Plugin enable/disable — symmetric lifecycle pairs.

properties.name: Deep Interlock
properties.assessment: Plugins interlock with core via EventBus + HookSystem. API bridges external/internal. Context dict.

properties.name: Contrast
properties.assessment: Core (fixed) vs Extensions (dynamic). Events (fire-and-forget) vs Hooks (modify-and-return). Clear contrast.

properties.name: Gradients
properties.assessment: Priority gradients: SYSTEM→HIGH→NORMAL→LOW→MONITOR in EventBus and HookSystem.

properties.name: Roughness
properties.assessment: Lorenz chaos, stochastic exploration, emergent plugin interactions, non-deterministic event ordering.

properties.name: Echoes
properties.assessment: Plugin lifecycle echoes center lifecycle. EventBus subscribe echoes endocrine subscribe. Pattern echoes.

properties.name: The Void
properties.assessment: MAJOR: Plugin system, event bus, 20 hook points, REST API, contrib/ directory — intentional space for growth.

properties.name: Simplicity and Inner Calm
properties.assessment: Extension architecture adds complexity but is well-encapsulated. Each extension module has single responsibility.

properties.name: Not-Separateness
properties.assessment: Plugins participate in same tick loop. API exposes same state. No separate worlds. Part of DTE ecosystem.

weakest.name: Simplicity and Inner Calm
weakest.assessment: Extension architecture adds complexity but is well-encapsulated. Each extension module has single responsibility.

strongest.name: Strong Centres
strongest.assessment: 8 core centers + 3 extension centers (EventBus, PluginRegistry, HookSystem). All strongly defined with tests.

biggest_improvement.name: The Void
biggest_improvement.assessment: MAJOR: Plugin system, event bus, 20 hook points, REST API, contrib/ directory — intentional space for growth.
